title: Introducing NestDaddy — A Search Engine + API Platform
author: nestdaddy
summary:
What is NestDaddy?

NestDaddy is a fully independent search engine and developer API platform — built from scratch, no Google under the hood, no Elasticsearch, no shortcuts.

We crawl the web ourselves, rank results ourselves, and serve everything through a clean REST API that any developer can plug into their app.

The Search Engine

NestDaddy.com is a real search engine. Not a wrapper. Not a reseller.

  • Web, Images, Videos, News, Maps, Games, Research and AI Tools
  • Real-time news coverage across multiple regions
  • Built with regional content in mind — something the big players don't prioritize

The API Suite

Everything powering NestDaddy is available to developers:

  • 🔍 Search API — web search, clean JSON, language filter
  • 📰 News API — Global, Tech, Financial, Country News
  • 🖼️ Images API — image search, JSONL output for AI/LLM training
  • 🎮 Games API — full games directory
full_text:
What is NestDaddy?

NestDaddy is a fully independent search engine and developer API platform — built from scratch, no Google under the hood, no Elasticsearch, no shortcuts.

We crawl the web ourselves, rank results ourselves, and serve everything through a clean REST API that any developer can plug into their app.

The Search Engine

NestDaddy.com is a real search engine. Not a wrapper. Not a reseller.

Web, Images, Videos, News, Maps, Games, Research and AI Tools

Real-time news coverage across multiple regions

Built with regional content in mind — something the big players don't prioritize

The API Suite

Everything powering NestDaddy is available to developers:

🔍 Search API — web search, clean JSON, language filter

📰 News API — Global, Tech, Financial, Country News

🖼️ Images API — image search, JSONL output for AI/LLM training

🎮 Games API — full games directory

🤖 AI Tools API — categorized AI tools directory

💻 Software API — software listings

📚 Research API — academic papers

Why We Built This

Google Custom Search is expensive. NewsAPI is limited. Most data APIs ignore entire regions of the world.

We built NestDaddy to fix that.

Try It

All APIs come with a 7-day free trial.

🌐 https://nestdaddy.com

 🔧 https://nestdaddy.com/apis
